name: Business Ontology Owner Chat Guard
description: Applies exact authorized model-review replies and guards resident-analyst owner chat.

agentIds.description: OpenClaw agent ids whose inbound review replies and outbound chat are guarded.

workspacesByAgentId.description: Absolute workspace path for each configured resident agent id.

packageRoot.description: Legacy shared absolute path to the installed Business Ontology package.

packageRootsByAgentId.description: Absolute current-package path for each configured resident agent id.

pythonExecutable.description: Python executable used for the deterministic review handler.
